== Notes for [[Item:Q105184|Q105184]] ==

Esta Sra era de Extremaduras , y no fue hija de martin monje , alquien alteró y junto estas líneas ! J octavio G


----
This lady was from Extremamadura, and she was not the daughter of a martin monk, someone altered and joined these lines!

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000009525415567

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
